description: Composition Green kurta with herringbone print in purple, made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neck, herringbone printed yoke, three quarter sleeves with printed tape at the cuffs, and printed tape along the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The yoke with the mix-and-match herringbone print adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans or leggings, a colourful wooden bangle and flats. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
